evals.prompt: I just installed this skill. Make me an Instagram carousel about morning routines. (Assume config/config.json does NOT exist yet.)

assertions.text: Output starts the setup interview instead of generating — it does NOT attempt slide generation without config
Output asks for 2 reference photos (cover + headshot) and explains they preserve the user's real face on slides
Output handles a missing FAL_KEY by walking through fal.ai signup with a per-carousel cost estimate — not by erroring out
Output treats Blotato as optional with a manual-posting mode — installation does not require it
Output asks about brand colors/fonts/handle with sensible defaults offered
Output writes secrets only to config/.env, never into config.json

evals.prompt: Create a 10-slide listicle carousel: 5 Cold Email Mistakes That Kill Your Reply Rate. Target audience: B2B founders. Config exists with handle 'samclient', accent #ED0D51.

assertions.text: Output writes a slides.json plan and runs scripts/generate-carousel.mjs (not ad-hoc API code)
Cover slide uses ref PHOTO_COVER and CTA slide uses ref PHOTO_CTA (the client reference photos)
Prompt templates use the light warm background — never dark #0D0D0D, never purple/gradient
No prompt mentions any icon, emoji-style graphic, or abstract symbol
No prompt includes a slide counter like '2/10'
No slide copy exceeds 15 words
No banned AI words in any slide copy (delve, tapestry, leverage, unlock, elevate, etc.)
No em or en dashes anywhere in slide copy or pinned prompt text
Brand footer text uses the config handle '@samclient' — not '@leadgen' or any author handle
Slide copy is presented for approval BEFORE image generation, with the image-fit table (Step 3.5)
The quality gate + preview steps run before the carousel is presented as done
The final slide has a CTA with a comment trigger keyword or follow CTA

evals.prompt: Create a carousel: The 3 Tools I Use to Get 1,000 Leads/Day. 8 slides. Tools are bolt.new, Instantly, and Claude Code. Config exists.

assertions.text: Output requires real screenshots of each named tool (user-provided or Playwright-captured) — never fabricated UIs
No prompt asks the AI to generate or render a company logo
The image-fit table scores each slide's image against its headline with an 80% bar and zero duplicates
No prompt duplicates a tool name (logo text AND separate name text)
No slide copy exceeds 15 words; no banned words; no icons; light background
CTA uses comment trigger keyword or follow prompt

evals.prompt: The carousel passed the gate and preview. Publish it. Config has publish: 'manual' and no BLOTATO_API_KEY.

assertions.text: Output uploads slides via scripts/upload-slides.mjs to get public CDN URLs (never Google Drive links)
Output produces a manual posting handoff: ordered slide URLs + clean caption + hashtags-as-first-comment instructions
Output does NOT error or block on the missing Blotato key
If the CTA is a comment keyword, output asks the user to confirm it is configured in their DM tool before posting
Output mentions Blotato as the optional upgrade path for auto-publishing

evals.prompt: Slide 4 has a typo in the headline ('Recieve'). Fix it.

assertions.text: Output regenerates ONLY slide 4 via generate-carousel.mjs --plan <plan> 4, not the whole set
Output re-runs the quality gate after regeneration
Output re-reads the regenerated slide to verify the spelling fix and style consistency with neighbors
